hero.title: I experiment with technology, blend it with design, and innovate for human needs.

aiChat.greeting: Hello! I'm a digital consciousness, trained on this portfolio. Ask me anything about the creator's work or thoughts.
aiChat.promptPlaceholder: Ask about my work, skills, philosophy...

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.paragraph1: As a designer, I am driven by the convergence of disparate fields. I thrive on combining, blending, and innovating with emerging technologies to create experiences that are not just useful, but meaningful. My process is a dialogue between human needs and technological possibilities.
about.paragraph2: Click on a cell in the grid to generate a unique design philosophy statement, powered by a simple AI model trained on my work and ethos.

philosophies.statement: Design is a medium for conversation, not just a solution.
Technology should be an extension of human capability, not a replacement.
Embrace ambiguity and complexity to find novel insights.
The most powerful experiences are born from interdisciplinary collaboration.
Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication in digital experiences.
Every pixel should serve a purpose beyond aesthetics.
Innovation happens at the intersection of constraints and creativity.
Human-centered design begins with empathy and ends with impact.
The best interfaces disappear, leaving only the experience.
Accessibility is not a feature, it's a fundamental right.
Sustainable design considers both user needs and planetary impact.
Failure is the best teacher in the design process.
Context is king in user experience design.
The future of design is collaborative and inclusive.

bio.intro: I'm a passionate product designer and technologist who believes in the power of interdisciplinary collaboration to solve complex human problems. With a background spanning design, technology, and innovation, I create experiences that bridge the gap between human needs and technological possibilities.
bio.mission: My mission is to design products and experiences that not only solve problems but also inspire and empower people to achieve their full potential. I believe in creating technology that serves humanity, not the other way around.
bio.approach: I approach design as a conversation between constraints and creativity, between user needs and technological capabilities. Every project is an opportunity to learn, iterate, and push the boundaries of what's possible.

education.description: Specialized in Product Design with focus on Human-Computer Interaction and Digital Innovation
Comprehensive UX design program covering research, prototyping, and user testing methodologies
Advanced frontend development skills including React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies

experience.description: Leading design initiatives for aerospace technology interfaces, focusing on safety and user experience in high-stakes environments.
Designed user experiences for web applications and mobile apps, collaborating with development teams to implement design solutions.
Worked on game design and interactive experiences, learning the fundamentals of user-centered design and rapid prototyping.

awards.title: Best UX Design
awards.description: Recognized for innovative user experience design in healthcare applications

awards.title: Innovation Award
awards.description: Awarded for breakthrough design solutions in aerospace technology

aiPhilosophy.context: As a designer, I am driven by the convergence of disparate fields. I thrive on combining, blending, and innovating with emerging technologies to create experiences that are not just useful, but meaningful. My process is a dialogue between human needs and technological possibilities. I believe design is a medium for conversation, technology should be an extension of human capability, ambiguity should be embraced, and collaboration is key.
aiPhilosophy.promptTemplate: Generate a concise design philosophy statement (under 15 words) based on the following context: {context}. The statement should feel insightful and unique.

projects.title: Prism
projects.description: An immersive data narrative exploring climate change through generative visuals.
projects.fullDescription: Prism (Present Resonance Interface for Sensory Mindfulness) is a stylish, minimalist wearable device designed to gently nudge users back to the present moment through subtle sensory cues. It combines haptic feedback, soft light, and a companion app to cultivate mindfulness without screen dependency.
projects.designProcess:
This project was a six-week sprint from idea to a fully functional mindfulness product, designed to help users stay present in the moment by addressing chronic digital distraction and cognitive overload. 
Throughout the development process, I tackled multiple challenges, including rapid prototyping, user testing, marketing, and financial constraints. With a strict budget of ₹400,I focused on cost-effective materials, minimalistic yet engaging design, and creative marketing strategies to ensure accessibility and scalability.
From initial research and ideation to final product execution and promotional planning, every stage was optimized for efficiency, proving that impactful design doesn’t require a high budget—just the right vision and execution.
projects.technicalDetails: An explanation of the technology stack and implementation details. For example, discussing the use of WebGL for generative visuals in Project Alpha. The core of this project is built with Three.js and a custom GLSL shader pipeline for performance. Data is fetched from a public API and processed on the client-side.

sections.content: The visualization engine processes real-time climate data from multiple sources, transforming complex datasets into intuitive visual narratives. Each particle represents a data point, creating an organic, ever-changing representation of our planet's climate patterns.

The technical architecture leverages WebGL shaders for real-time rendering, enabling smooth animations even with thousands of data points. Custom algorithms interpolate between data states, creating fluid transitions that help users understand temporal changes in climate patterns.

projects.title: Project Beta
projects.description: A mobile app that uses AI to create personalized soundscapes for focus and relaxation.
projects.fullDescription: A mobile app that uses AI to create personalized soundscapes for focus and relaxation. By analyzing user input and biometric data (with permission), the app generates ambient audio tailored to the user's current state.
projects.designProcess: The design process was heavily focused on user experience and creating a calming, intuitive interface. We conducted user interviews with people who use focus apps and identified key pain points. Iterative prototyping and testing were crucial to refining the sound generation algorithm and UI.
projects.technicalDetails: The app is built using React Native. The AI component is a custom-trained neural network hosted on a cloud service, which processes user data to generate sound parameters. We also integrated with health APIs to optionally use data like heart rate variability.

sections.content: The app's neural network analyzes patterns in user behavior, heart rate variability, and environmental factors to generate personalized soundscapes. Machine learning models trained on thousands of audio samples create unique compositions that adapt to individual preferences and physiological responses.

projects.title: Project Gamma
projects.description: A speculative design project imagining future interfaces for brain-computer interaction.
projects.fullDescription: A speculative design project imagining future interfaces for brain-computer interaction. This project doesn't aim to build a working product, but to provoke thought and discussion about the future of human-computer interfaces and their ethical implications.
projects.designProcess: This project was driven by 'what if' scenarios. We created a series of design fictions, including concept videos and physical prototypes, to illustrate how BCI might integrate into daily life. The process involved world-building and narrative creation as much as traditional design work.
projects.technicalDetails: While no real BCI was used, we prototyped the interface concepts using Figma and Framer, simulating the experience of a thought-controlled UI. The prototypes were used in user workshops to gather feedback on the concepts.

sections.content: Through speculative design methods, we explored the intersection of neurotechnology and human experience. The project examines not just what's technically possible, but what's ethically desirable in a future where thoughts directly control digital interfaces.

projects.title: Project Delta
projects.description: An interactive installation about AI ethics.
projects.fullDescription: An interactive installation about AI ethics. This physical installation presents users with ethical dilemmas related to AI and visualizes the collective choices of all participants.
projects.designProcess: The core of the design process was crafting compelling and nuanced ethical scenarios. We worked with ethicists and AI researchers to ensure the content was accurate and thought-provoking. The physical design of the installation was meant to be both inviting and slightly unsettling, to match the theme.
projects.technicalDetails: The installation uses a combination of projection mapping, custom-built hardware with sensors (Arduino), and a backend server (Node.js) to collect and process user responses. The visualizations are created with p5.js.

sections.content: The installation challenges visitors to confront complex ethical scenarios in AI development. Real-time data visualization shows how collective human responses shift as more people interact with the system, creating a living reflection of our societal values around artificial intelligence.

projects.title: Project Epsilon
projects.description: A tool for collaborative world-building for writers and game designers.
projects.fullDescription: A web-based platform that enables multiple users to collaboratively create and manage fictional worlds. It includes tools for map making, character development, and timeline creation.
projects.designProcess: The project started from identifying the needs of creative teams. We interviewed Dungeons & Dragons groups, novelists, and indie game developers. The design focuses on flexible data structures and a non-linear creative process.
projects.technicalDetails: Built with React and a real-time database (Firebase) to allow for seamless collaboration. The map-making tool uses Leaflet.js with custom overlays.

sections.content: Collaborative storytelling requires tools that adapt to creative chaos. This platform provides structured flexibility, allowing teams to build complex fictional worlds while maintaining narrative coherence across multiple contributors.

projects.title: Project Zeta
projects.description: An AR experience that reveals the hidden histories of city landmarks.
projects.fullDescription: An augmented reality mobile app that overlays historical photos and information onto real-world buildings and locations as you view them through your phone's camera.
projects.designProcess: We partnered with local historians to gather archival content. The UX challenge was to present this information in an engaging way without overwhelming the user. We used narrative threads to guide users on historical walks.
projects.technicalDetails: The app uses ARKit for iOS and ARCore for Android. 3D models of historical scenes were created in Blender and optimized for mobile performance.

sections.content: Augmented reality becomes a time machine, revealing layers of history embedded in familiar spaces. The app transforms everyday walks into immersive historical journeys, connecting past and present through digital storytelling.

projects.title: Project Eta
projects.description: A generative music system based on weather patterns.
projects.fullDescription: A web application that fetches real-time weather data for any location and translates it into a unique, ever-changing piece of ambient music.
projects.designProcess: The core of the project was mapping meteorological variables (temperature, wind speed, precipitation) to musical parameters (tempo, key, instrumentation). The UI is minimalist, focusing on the auditory experience.
projects.technicalDetails: Uses the Web Audio API for sound synthesis. A Node.js backend fetches data from a weather API. The musical logic is a custom algorithm that ensures consonant and pleasant-sounding output.

sections.content: Weather patterns become musical compositions, translating the planet's atmospheric data into ambient soundscapes. Each location generates its unique sonic signature, creating an ever-changing global symphony driven by meteorological forces.

projects.fullDescription: A web application that fetches real-time weather data for any location and translates it into a unique, ever-changing piece of ambient music.

experimentalProjects.title: OTTOLY SAVINGS
experimentalProjects.description: A mobile app for smart savings and financial planning with AI-powered insights.
experimentalProjects.fullDescription: OTTOLY SAVINGS is an innovative mobile application designed to revolutionize personal finance management. The app combines AI-powered insights with intuitive user experience to help users save money intelligently and achieve their financial goals.
experimentalProjects.designProcess: The design process focused on creating a trustworthy and engaging financial app that users would want to use daily. We conducted extensive user research with people from various financial backgrounds to understand pain points in money management.
experimentalProjects.technicalDetails: Built with React Native and integrated with machine learning algorithms for spending pattern analysis. The app uses secure APIs for bank integration and implements advanced encryption for financial data protection.

sections.content: The app's AI engine analyzes spending patterns and provides personalized recommendations for saving money. Users can set financial goals, track progress, and receive intelligent suggestions for optimizing their spending habits.

experimentalProjects.title: WELLNEST DOCUMENTS
experimentalProjects.description: Digital document management system that eliminates paperwork and streamlines workflows.
experimentalProjects.fullDescription: WELLNEST DOCUMENTS is a comprehensive digital document management platform designed to eliminate the need for physical paperwork in modern businesses. The system streamlines document workflows, automates approval processes, and ensures secure storage and retrieval.
experimentalProjects.designProcess: Our design approach focused on creating an intuitive interface that would make the transition from paper to digital seamless for users. We prioritized user experience to ensure high adoption rates across different age groups and technical skill levels.
experimentalProjects.technicalDetails: Built with React and Node.js, featuring real-time collaboration tools, advanced search capabilities, and integration with popular business software. The platform uses cloud storage with enterprise-grade security measures.

sections.content: The platform transforms how organizations handle documents, from creation to archiving. Features include automated workflow routing, digital signatures, version control, and comprehensive audit trails for compliance purposes.

experimentalProjects.title: PATHFINDER MENTORS
experimentalProjects.description: A mentorship platform connecting students with industry professionals for career guidance.
experimentalProjects.fullDescription: PATHFINDER MENTORS is a digital platform that bridges the gap between students and industry professionals. The platform facilitates meaningful mentorship relationships, helping students navigate their career paths with guidance from experienced professionals.
experimentalProjects.designProcess: The design process centered around creating a warm, welcoming environment that would encourage both mentors and mentees to engage actively. We focused on building trust through transparent profiles and structured communication channels.
experimentalProjects.technicalDetails: Developed using React and Firebase, featuring real-time messaging, video calling capabilities, and intelligent matching algorithms. The platform includes comprehensive profile management and scheduling tools.

sections.content: The platform creates meaningful connections between mentors and mentees through intelligent matching algorithms and structured programs. Features include goal setting, progress tracking, and community building tools.

experimentalProjects.title: REKORDER MUSIC
experimentalProjects.description: Professional music recording and production software with AI-assisted mixing capabilities.
experimentalProjects.fullDescription: REKORDER MUSIC is a professional-grade music production software that combines traditional recording tools with cutting-edge AI technology. The platform assists musicians and producers in creating high-quality recordings with intelligent mixing and mastering suggestions.
experimentalProjects.designProcess: The design process focused on creating an interface that would be intuitive for both beginners and professional audio engineers. We prioritized workflow efficiency and visual feedback for complex audio operations.
experimentalProjects.technicalDetails: Built with Electron and Web Audio API, featuring real-time audio processing, VST plugin support, and AI-powered mixing algorithms. The software includes advanced audio analysis tools and automated mastering capabilities.

sections.content: The AI engine analyzes audio tracks and provides intelligent suggestions for mixing, EQ, compression, and effects. This helps both novice and experienced producers achieve professional-quality results more efficiently.

experimentalProjects.title: NEURAL CANVAS
experimentalProjects.description: AI-powered digital art creation tool that generates unique artworks based on user prompts.
experimentalProjects.fullDescription: NEURAL CANVAS is an innovative digital art platform that leverages artificial intelligence to help artists and creators generate unique artworks. Users can input text descriptions, upload reference images, or combine multiple styles to create original pieces.
experimentalProjects.designProcess: The design process focused on creating an intuitive interface that would make AI art generation accessible to users of all skill levels. We prioritized creative freedom while maintaining ease of use and clear visual feedback.
experimentalProjects.technicalDetails: Built with React and TensorFlow.js, featuring multiple AI models for different art styles and techniques. The platform includes real-time preview generation, style transfer capabilities, and collaborative features.

sections.content: The AI models are trained on diverse artistic styles and can generate everything from realistic portraits to abstract compositions. Users can fine-tune parameters, blend multiple styles, and export high-resolution artwork for various purposes.

experimentalProjects.title: QUANTUM DASHBOARD
experimentalProjects.description: Real-time data visualization platform for complex datasets with interactive 3D representations.
experimentalProjects.fullDescription: QUANTUM DASHBOARD is a cutting-edge data visualization platform that transforms complex datasets into intuitive, interactive 3D representations. The platform is designed for data scientists, researchers, and business analysts who need to explore and present complex information.
experimentalProjects.designProcess: The design process focused on creating an interface that would make complex data accessible and engaging. We prioritized performance, interactivity, and the ability to handle large datasets without compromising user experience.
experimentalProjects.technicalDetails: Built with Three.js and WebGL for 3D graphics, featuring real-time data processing, interactive visualizations, and support for multiple data formats. The platform includes advanced filtering, zooming, and collaboration tools.

sections.content: The platform can handle millions of data points in real-time, providing smooth 3D navigation and interactive exploration. Users can create custom visualizations, share insights, and collaborate on data analysis projects.
